- CVE-2026-8368: LWP: UserAgent: Authorization and Proxy-Authorization headers are leaked on cross-origin redirects
  (bsc#1265156).

"cpe:/o:suse:sles-ltss-extended-security:12:sp5"}}}], "category": "product_family", "name": "SUSE Linux Enterprise"}], "category": "vendor", "name": "SUSE"}], "relationships": [{"category": "default_component_of", "full_product_name": {"name": "perl-libwww-perl-6.05-6.3.1.noarch as component of SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5", "product_id": "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:perl-libwww-perl-6.05-6.3.1.noarch"}, "product_reference": "perl-libwww-perl-6.05-6.3.1.noarch", "relates_to_product_reference": "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5"}]}, "vulnerabilities": [{"cve": "CVE-2026-8368", "ids": [{"system_name": "SUSE CVE Page", "text": "https://www.suse.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-8368"}], "notes": [{"category": "general", "text": "LWP::UserAgent versions before 6.83 for Perl leak Authorization and Proxy-Authorization headers on cross-origin redirects.

On a 3xx response, the redirect handler strips only Host and Cookie before issuing the follow-up request. Caller-supplied Authorization and Proxy-Authorization headers are sent unchanged to the redirect target, including across scheme, host, or port changes.

A redirect to an attacker controlled host therefore discloses the caller's credentials to that host.", "title": "CVE description"}], "product_status": {"recommended": ["SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:perl-libwww-perl-6.05-6.3.1.noarch"]}, "references": [{"category": "external", "summary": "CVE-2026-8368", "url": "https://www.suse.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-8368"}, {"category": "external", "summary": "SUSE Bug 1265156 for CVE-2026-8368", "url": "https://bugzilla.suse.com/1265156"}], "remediations": [{"category": "vendor_fix", "details": "To install this SUSE Security Update use the SUSE recommended installation methods like YaST online_update or "zypper patch".
", "product_ids": ["SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:perl-libwww-perl-6.05-6.3.1.noarch"]}], "scores": [{"cvss_v3": {"baseScore": 5.3, "baseSeverity": "MEDIUM", "vectorString": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N", "version": "3.1"}, "products": ["SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:perl-libwww-perl-6.05-6.3.1.noarch"]}], "threats": [{"category": "impact", "date": "2026-07-15T09:54:08Z", "details": "moderate"}], "title": "CVE-2026-8368"}]}

fixed_versions: To install this SUSE Security Update use the SUSE recommended installation methods like YaST online_update or "zypper patch".
